page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter for Pride: Celebrate on the Water

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella yacht charter for Pride 2025. Celebrate on the water from Puerto Banús with 12 boats, free drinks & skipper from €749/2h.
data.summary: Celebrate Marbella Pride with a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Our fleet of 17 boats includes inclusive packages with skipper, drinks, and snacks, starting at €749 for 2 hours.
key_facts: Marbella Pride celebrations typically take place in late June or early July.
Yacht charter prices start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39.
Mangusta 80 charters (minimum 4h) include a free jet ski.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT.
Boats depart from Puerto Banús, just 10 minutes from Marbella's Golden Mile.
Maximum group size ranges from 5 pax (Dubhe) to 12 pax (Mangusta 80, Ferretti 94).
Book via WhatsApp for availability on any boat not listed with fixed pricing.

faq.a: Marbella Pride usually takes place over a weekend in late June or early July. For 2025, the exact dates are announced by the Marbella Pride committee a few months ahead. We recommend booking your yacht charter early, as demand spikes during Pride week.

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring Pride flags, banners, and other decorations. Just ensure they do not damage the boat's surfaces. Our crew can help you set them up safely. Avoid using confetti or glitter, as these are difficult to clean and may incur a cleaning fee.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), the price is €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours.

faq.q: Which boat is best for a large Pride group?
faq.a: For groups up to 12 people, the Mangusta 80 (24m), Ferretti 94 (29m), or Maiora 26m are excellent choices. They offer spacious decks, sun pads, and a flybridge. The Mangusta 80 also includes a free jet ski for your charter.

faq.q: Can we play our own music on the yacht?
faq.a: Absolutely. All our yachts are equipped with Bluetooth or AUX-connected sound systems. You can create a Pride playlist and play it through the boat's speakers. Our crew will ensure the volume is appropriate for the marina and sea conditions.

faq.q: What time do charters start and end?
faq.a: Charters can start as early as 10:00 and as late as 18:00, depending on the boat and availability. Standard durations are 2, 4, 6, or 8 hours. For sunset Pride cruises, a 6-hour charter from 16:00 to 22:00 is popular.

faq.q: Is there a minimum age for passengers?
faq.a: There is no minimum age, but children must be accompanied by an adult and wear a life jacket when on deck. Our boats have safety equipment for all ages. Please let us know if you are bringing infants so we can prepare appropriate life vests.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for Marbella Pride?
faq.a: You can book directly via WhatsApp through our website. For boats with fixed pricing (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39, Mangusta 80 variants), we can confirm immediately. For other boats, we will provide a quote within a few hours.

data.body_html:
Marbella Pride is one of the Costa del Sol's most vibrant celebrations, and there's no better way to mark the occasion than with a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Whether you're planning a daytime party with friends or a sunset cruise under the stars, our fleet of 17 boats offers something for every group size and budget. From the affordable Astondoa 40 at €749 for two hours to the luxurious Mangusta 80 with a free jet ski, your Pride celebration on the water starts here.

Why Choose a Marbella Yacht Charter for Pride?

Marbella's coastline is tailor-made for celebration. Departing from Puerto Banús, you'll cruise past the Golden Mile, Cala del Faro, and the iconic La Concha mountain. On a yacht, you control the itinerary, the music, and the vibe. No crowded bars, no queues — just you, your guests, and the Mediterranean. Plus, every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks, so you can focus on having a great time.

Our Pride-Friendly Fleet

We have boats for every Pride group, from intimate gatherings to full-blown parties. Here are the highlights:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749/2h or €2,299/8h. Ideal for a small group wanting a stylish, affordable day out.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – Same price as the Astondoa, with a slightly larger capacity.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax, white or grey) – €4,719 minimum 4h, includes a free jet ski. Perfect for a party with space to dance.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – Our flagship, with a flybridge and sun deck for lounging.
  • Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) – For a more active celebration, towing inflatables or watersports.

For full specs on all 17 boats, visit our main fleet page.

What's Included in Your Charter

Every booking comes with a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). No hidden costs. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), the price is fixed. For others, we provide a quote via WhatsApp.

Popular Pride Itineraries from Puerto Banús

Here are three routes our guests love for Pride celebrations:

  • Puerto Banús to Cala del Faro (30 min) – Anchor at this scenic cove for swimming and photos with the Marbella skyline behind you.
  • Puerto Banús to Cabopino (1 hour) – A quieter spot with sandy beaches and a nature reserve. Great for a relaxed lunch stop.
  • Sunset cruise along the Golden Mile – Depart at 18:00, watch the sun dip behind La Concha, and return under the lights of Puerto Banús.

Pricing Overview

BoatLengthMax PaxPrice (2h)Price (8h)
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749€2,299
Azimut 3912.5m11€749€2,299
Mangusta 80 (all)24m12€4,719 (4h min)—

How to Book Your Pride Yacht Charter

Booking is simple. Head to our homepage and click the WhatsApp button. Tell us your preferred date, group size, and desired duration. For Tier A boats, we can confirm instantly. For others, we'll respond within a few hours with a personalised quote. We recommend booking at least two weeks in advance for Pride week.

Tips for a Memorable Pride Celebration on the Water

  • Bring your own playlist – All yachts have Bluetooth speakers.
  • Pack sunscreen and hats – The Mediterranean sun is strong, even in June.
  • Decorate your boat – Pride flags and bunting are welcome; avoid glitter or confetti.
  • Arrive early – Puerto Banús gets busy during Pride. Plan to board 15 minutes before departure.

Frequently Asked Questions

When is Marbella Pride 2025?

Marbella Pride usually takes place over a weekend in late June or early July. For 2025, the exact dates are announced by the Marbella Pride committee a few months ahead. We recommend booking your yacht charter early, as demand spikes during Pride week.

Can I bring my own decorations on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring Pride flags, banners, and other decorations. Just ensure they do not damage the boat's surfaces. Our crew can help you set them up safely. Avoid using confetti or glitter, as these are difficult to clean and may incur a cleaning fee.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), the price is €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours.

Which boat is best for a large Pride group?

For groups up to 12 people, the Mangusta 80 (24m), Ferretti 94 (29m), or Maiora 26m are excellent choices. They offer spacious decks, sun pads, and a flybridge. The Mangusta 80 also includes a free jet ski for your charter.

Can we play our own music on the yacht?

Absolutely. All our yachts are equipped with Bluetooth or AUX-connected sound systems. You can create a Pride playlist and play it through the boat's speakers. Our crew will ensure the volume is appropriate for the marina and sea conditions.

What time do charters start and end?

Charters can start as early as 10:00 and as late as 18:00, depending on the boat and availability. Standard durations are 2, 4, 6, or 8 hours. For sunset Pride cruises, a 6-hour charter from 16:00 to 22:00 is popular.

Is there a minimum age for passengers?

There is no minimum age, but children must be accompanied by an adult and wear a life jacket when on deck. Our boats have safety equipment for all ages. Please let us know if you are bringing infants so we can prepare appropriate life vests.

How do I book a yacht for Marbella Pride?

You can book directly via WhatsApp through our website. For boats with fixed pricing (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39, Mangusta 80 variants), we can confirm immediately. For other boats, we will provide a quote within a few hours.
